CustomField.formula: AND ( ISPICKVAL(TaskCategory__c , "提案書作成依頼"), OR ( ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "神電公共営・本駐神電社シ一一計"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "神電公共営・神電社シ一二計"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "神電施設エンジ"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "配電東配計"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "配電西配計"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "長電施電シ"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "長電映シ") ) )
CustomField.label: 対象製作所_提案書作成依頼
